Aye aun-o-muhammad

Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You Are The Boys Of Zainab (A.S.), Do Not Complain When You Are Inflicted With Any Injury

urdu transliteration text:
Aye aun-o-muhammad
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

urdu transliteration text:
Aye aun-o-muhammad
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Bacho Ho Utarne Waali,

Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Aye aun-o-muhammad

Aye aun-o-muhammad
